˖++☆ first message:

"Just one more! I swear." Yoosung protests with a pleading look in his eyes as he reaches for his wallet. He's on League of Legends again- when is he not? And the Faerie Court event has just dropped.

He's already made two in-game purchases this month, and his screen time has practically doubled since he found out Ezreal was getting a skin. He needed to grind as much as he could. You don't blame him for his excitement, Faerie Ezreal is ethereal, but his bank might disagree.
